# <span id="page-603-0"></span>**8 C H A NGE S FRO M PRE V IOU S V ER SI ON**

# <span id="page-603-1"></span>*8.1 Initial Public Health Case Report Document (eICR) (V5)*

**[Initial Public Health Case Report Document \(eICR\) \(V5\)](#page-70-0)  [\(urn:hl7ii:2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.15.2:2022-05-01\)](#page-70-0)**

| Change                  | Old                                                       | New                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|-------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Name                    | Initial Public Health Case Report<br>Document (eICR) (V4) | Initial Public Health Case Report<br>Document (eICR) (V5)                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Oid                     | urn:hl7ii:2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.<br>15.2:2021-01-01     | urn:hl7ii:2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.<br>15.2:2022-05-01                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| CONF #: 4527-1138 Added |                                                           | If available, the NPI **SHALL** be<br>provided<br>The representedOrganization, if<br>present, SHALL contain at least<br>one [1*] id (CONF:4527-1138).<br>Note: Facility Id: Identification code<br>for the facility in which care was<br>provided when the case was<br>triggered       |
| CONF #: 4527-1139 Added |                                                           | Such ids SHALL contain exactly<br>one [11] @root (CONF:4527-1139).                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| CONF #: 4527-1140 Added |                                                           | Such ids MAY contain zero or one<br>[01] @extension (CONF:4527-<br>1140).                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

# <span id="page-607-0"></span>*8.2 Initial Case Report Trigger Code Result Organizer (V2)*

**[Initial Case Report Trigger Code Result Organizer \(V2\)](#page-479-0)  [\(urn:hl7ii:2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.15.2.3.35:2022-05-01\)](#page-479-0)**

| Change      | Old                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | New                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|-------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Name        | Initial Case Report Trigger Code<br>Result Organizer                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Initial Case Report Trigger Code<br>Result Organizer (V2)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Oid         | urn:hl7ii:2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.<br>15.2.3.35:2019-04-01                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | urn:hl7ii:2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.<br>15.2.3.35:2022-05-01                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Description | This template is designed for<br>optional [0\*] use in a *Result<br>Section (entries required) (V3)*<br>contained in an *Initial Public<br>Health Case Report Document<br>(eICR)*.                                                                                                                                                                                 | This template is designed for<br>optional [0\*] use in a *Result<br>Section (entries required) (V3)*<br>contained in an *Initial Public<br>Health Case Report Document<br>(eICR)*.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|             | The *Initial Case Report Trigger<br>Code Result Organizer* is a flag to<br>indicate that the organizer code<br>(test battery/cluster name) is a<br>trigger code contained in the<br>[Reportable Condition Trigger<br>Codes](https://ersd.aimsplatform.o<br>rg/) and this template must be<br>present.                                                              | The *Initial Case Report Trigger<br>Code Result Organizer* is a flag to<br>indicate that the organizer code<br>(test battery/cluster name) is a<br>trigger code contained in the<br>[Reportable Condition Trigger<br>Codes](https://ersd.aimsplatform.o<br>rg/) and this template must be<br>present.                                                                            |
|             | This template further constrains<br>the C-CDA R2.1 *Result Organizer<br>(V3)*. It specifies that either<br>code/@sdtc:valueSet and<br>code/@sdtc:valueSetVersion or<br>translation/@sdtc:valueSet and<br>translation/@sdtc:valueSetVersion<br>must be present in order to capture<br>the RCTC OID<br>(2.16.840.1.114222.4.11.7505) and<br>RCTC definition version. | This template further constrains<br>the C-CDA R2.1 *Result Organizer<br>(V3)*. It specifies that either<br>code/@sdtc:valueSet and<br>code/@sdtc:valueSetVersion or<br>code/translation/@sdtc:valueSet<br>and<br>code/translation/@sdtc:valueSetVe<br>rsion must be present in order to<br>capture the RCTC OID<br>(2.16.840.1.114222.4.11.7505) and<br>RCTC definition version. |
|             | This template contains the C-CDA<br>supplemental template *Laboratory<br>Result Status (ID)* to carry the<br>laboratory result status as reported<br>by the originating laboratory.                                                                                                                                                                                | This template contains the C-CDA<br>supplemental template *Laboratory<br>Result Status (ID)* to carry the<br>laboratory result status as reported<br>by the originating laboratory.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|             | This template contains the C-CDA<br>supplemental template *Specimen<br>Collection Procedure (ID)* to<br>represent clinical information<br>about the specimen, including<br>when it was collected, the type and<br>source of specimen, as well as<br>related observations regarding the<br>specimen.                                                                | This template contains the C-CDA<br>supplemental template *Specimen<br>Collection Procedure (ID)* to<br>represent clinical information<br>about the specimen, including<br>when it was collected, the type and<br>source of specimen, as well as<br>related observations regarding the<br>specimen.                                                                              |
